title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.070 - Continuation of licenses
text:
237.070.  Continuation of licenses. — Such licenses shall continue until the end of the next term of the county commission; and the tax shall be assessed in proportion to the time for which the license is granted, and in all other respects the clerk and collector shall proceed as upon license granted by the commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 15293) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14205; 1919 § 5539; 1909 § 6482
